content:
## Scenarios

### S1: Push issue to GitLab
Agent writes IssueProtocol to DB → SyncEngine calls GitLabSyncAdapter.push_issue → creates GitLab issue → returns SyncResult with iid + url

### S2: Pull code from GitHub
SyncEngine calls GitHubSyncAdapter.pull_code_index → fetches repo tree + file content → returns CodeIndexProtocol

### S3: Stub adapter returns NotSupported
JiraSyncAdapter.push_spec → Err(NovaError::NotSupported)
